title: girls trip to budapest | hungarian food, river cruise & thrifting
description:
hi guys! i'm so excited to share this video with you because this trip turned out to be truly MAGICAL! we had so much fun exploring the city, trying traditional hungarian food and best of all, going on a river cruise with unlimited prosecco, wow what a trip!! budapest, you really charmed us!! 🩷
